footer.tagline: Digital solutions for SMBs. Fast. Personal. Sustainable.

hero.title: Digital for SMBs –
hero.subtitle: We grew up in the SMB world ourselves. We know what it's like when day-to-day business leaves no time for digital projects. That's why we take care of it – no buzzword bingo, no overpriced proposals.

reality.title: Let's be honest: Here's what SMB looks like
reality.subtitle: No fear-mongering – just facts you probably know yourself.

stats.oldWebsite: have a website older than 5 years

whyHard.title: Why it's so hard – and why that's totally normal

business.title: You've got a business to run.
business.text: Clients to serve. Employees to manage. Invoices to write. Who has time to dive into React, SEO, and GDPR?

agencies.title: The big agencies?
agencies.text: Want €50,000 for a website. And then you still don't have a booking system.

builders.title: The website builders?
builders.text: Sure, Wix and Squarespace exist. But after 3 evenings of clicking around, it still looks like 'Website circa 2015'.

notFailure.title: That's not failure
notFailure.text: – it's just not your job. That's exactly why we exist.

story.title: How it all started with a handbuilt catamaran

easyLiving.title: Easy Living – a life's work
easyLiving.built: My father spent over 10 years building a 44-foot sailing catamaran.
easyLiving.builtDesc: With his own hands. Every plank, every sail, every screw. Anyone who does something like that knows what perseverance means.
easyLiving.charterIntro: Since 2016, he's been running charter trips –
easyLiving.charterLocations: Caribbean, Mediterranean, Baltic Sea trips from Travemünde
easyLiving.charterDesc: A one-man business, built with nothing but skill, passion, and a hell of a lot of work.
easyLiving.businessDesc: Regulars rave about it. Reviews are top-notch. Anyone who's sailed with him comes back.
easyLiving.butWebsite: But the website? It was from 2012.
easyLiving.noSeo: No responsive design. No online booking. No SEO. While new customers searched Google for 'catamaran charter Baltic Sea', they found the competition – not my father.

problem.title: The Problem
problem.text1: 'I'm a sailor, not an IT guy,' my father always said. And he was absolutely right.
problem.text1Bold: Why should someone who can build a catamaran by hand also know how to program React apps?
problem.text2: He simply had no time or desire to spend months dealing with code, SEO, GDPR, and payment systems. He wanted to sail and make his guests happy.

solution.title: The Solution
solution.text1Bold: So in 2025, we built it for him.
solution.text1: A completely new platform: Modern React website, real-time booking calendar, automated emails, 100% mobile-optimized, SEO-strong.
solution.text2: Everything he needed – without having to touch a single line of code himself.

realization.title: And then it hit us:
realization.text1Bold: a successful entrepreneur who built a damn catamaran with his own hands
realization.question: ...how many other entrepreneurs out there are facing the same problem?
realization.answer: Thousands? Tens of thousands? The entire German SMB sector?

mission.title: That's why Adaptify exists
mission.subtitle: Custom digital solutions for SMBs – affordable and human. No cookie-cutter templates, just exactly what your business needs.

custom.title: Custom-Built
custom.desc: Every business is different. We don't build off-the-shelf websites – we build solutions that fit your business.

honest.title: Honest & Fair
honest.desc: We won't sell you what you don't need. And we'll tell you what it costs upfront – no nasty surprises.

fast.title: Fast & Personal
fast.desc: No agency bureaucracy. You talk directly to us. And we deliver in weeks, not months.

partner.title: By Your Side
partner.desc: After go-live, we don't leave you hanging. We continue to support your solutions sustainably.

team.title: The People Behind Adaptify
team.subtitle: Not an anonymous agency – real people with real stories.

julius.quote: My father built a catamaran with his own hands – but when it came to his website, he was stuck. That shouldn't happen. That's exactly why Adaptify exists.

hiring.title: Looking for Talent
hiring.text: Prefer SMBs over corporations? Real projects over PowerPoint? Get in touch - we're looking for people with a maker mindset.

cases.title: What we've built so far
cases.subtitle: Five real projects from our current portfolio – with clear positioning, functional design and real digital value.

easyLiving.title: Easy Living Catamaran
easyLiving.desc: A modern website for a hand-built catamaran with clear offer structure, strong imagery and a professional presence for charter and tourism.

biss.title: BISS App & Landing Page
biss.desc: App concept and landing page for a fishing app from Northern Germany – with a clear audience focus, robust UI and strong product messaging.

spotmap.title: SpotMap
spotmap.desc: Progressive Web App for sharing secret spots with friends – with interactive map, categories and Magic Link auth.

haushalt.title: Household Budget App
haushalt.desc: Personal finance app as PWA with Neon PostgreSQL – monthly overviews, donut charts and multi-device sync.

congress.title: Market Movers & Congress Tracker
congress.desc: Next.js app with Prisma and Supabase for tracking Congressional Votes and market analysis with charts.

yourProject.title: Your project could be here
yourProject.desc: We document every project as a success story. Let's write yours together.

quote.text: Digitalization doesn't have to be rocket science. And it doesn't have to cost 50,000 euros. We want every small business, every family company to have the same chances as the big players - just at a budget that fits.
quote.author: – Julius Schulze, Founder Adaptify
